info.title: Access Control API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the Access Control Service. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub

tags.name: Access Control List
tags.description: This contains the APIs to perform access control checks

tags.name: Permissions
tags.description: This contains the APIs related to permissions

tags.name: Role Assignments
tags.description: This contains APIs for CRUD on role assignments

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: This contains APIs for CRUD on roles

post.description: Check for permission on resource(s) for a principal

requestBody.description: These are the checks to perform for Access Control.

default.description: Result of the access check request

get.description: Get all permissions in a scope or all permissions in the system

parameters.name: scopeFilterDisabled
parameters.description: This is to enable or disable filtering by scope. The default value is false. If the value is true, all the permissions in the system are fetched.

get.description: Get all resource types for permissions in a scope or in the system.

parameters.name: scopeFilterDisabled
parameters.description: This is to enable or disable filtering by scope. The default value is false. If the value is true, all the permissions in the system are fetched.

post.description: Bulk delete role assignments by identifiers

requestBody.description: List of role assigment identifiers to be deleted

post.description: Create multiple role assignments in a scope. Returns all successfully created role assignments. Ignores failures and duplicates.

requestBody.description: List of role assignments to create

get.description: List role assignments in the given scope

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page Index of the results to fetch.Default Value: 0

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Page Token of the next results to fetch.Default Value: ''

default.description: Paginated list of role assignments in the given scope

post.description: Creates role assignment within the specified scope.

requestBody.description: These are details for the role assignment to create.

default.description: These are details of the created role assignment.

get.description: Get an existing role assignment by identifier

default.description: Get an existing role assignment by identifier in the given scope

delete.description: Delete an existing role assignment by identifier

post.description: List role assignments in the scope according to the given filter

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page Index of the results to fetch.Default Value: 0

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Page Token of the next results to fetch.Default Value: ''

requestBody.description: Filter role assignments based on multiple parameters.

default.description: Paginated list of role assignments in the scope according to the given filter

post.summary: List Aggregated Role Assignments by filter
post.description: List role assignments in the scope according to the given filter with added metadata

requestBody.description: Filter role assignments based on multiple parameters.

default.description: Paginated list of role assignments in the scope according to the given filter with added metadata.

post.summary: List Role Assignments by scope filter
post.description: List role assignments in the scope according to the given filter

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page Index of the results to fetch.Default Value: 0

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Page Token of the next results to fetch.Default Value: ''

default.description: Paginated list of role assignments in the scope according to the given filter

post.description: Check whether a proposed role assignment is valid.

requestBody.description: This is the details of the role assignment for validation.

default.description: This is the result of the role assignment validation request.

get.description: List roles in the given scope

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Page Index of the results to fetch.Default Value: 0

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Page Token of the next results to fetch.Default Value: ''

parameters.name: harnessManaged
parameters.description: Filter role by being harness managed

default.description: Paginated list of roles in the given scope

post.description: Create a Custom Role in a scope

put.description: Update a Custom Role by identifier

delete.description: Delete a Custom Role in a scope

Failure.description: This is Failure entity as defied in Harness

Error.description: This is Error entity as defined in Harness

ErrorMetadata.description: This implements different error meta data objects

permissions.description: List of permission checks to perform

successfullyDeleted.description: Number of roleassignings that are successfully deleted.

failedToDelete.description: Number of roleassignings that are not deleted

roleAssignmentErrorResponseDTOList.description: List of roleassignments along with error message that are not deleted.

roleAssignmentId.description: Identifier of roleassignment that is not deleted.

errorMessage.description: Error message due to which roleassignment cannot be deleted.

RoleAssignmentErrorResponseDTO.description: List of roleassignments along with error message that are not deleted.

scopeLevel.description: scope level of the role. Valid values are account, organization and project.

resourceGroupFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on resource group identifiers

items.description: Filter role assignments based on resource group identifiers

roleFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on role identifiers

items.description: Filter role assignments based on role identifiers

roleReferenceFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on roles

principalTypeFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on principal type

principalScopeLevelFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on principal scope level

items.description: Filter role assignments based on principal scope level

principalFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on principals

harnessManagedFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on role assignments being harness managed

items.description: Filter role assignments based on role assignments being harness managed

disabledFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on whether they are enabled or disabled

items.description: Filter role assignments based on whether they are enabled or disabled

permissions.description: List of the permission identifiers (Subset of the list returned by GET /authz/api/permissions)

items.description: List of the permission identifiers (Subset of the list returned by GET /authz/api/permissions)

allowedScopeLevels.description: The scope levels at which this role can be used

items.description: The scope levels at which this role can be used

AttributeFilter.description: Used to filter resources on their attributes

ResourceFilter.description: Contains resource filter for a resource group

ResourceSelectorV2.description: Used to specify resources in resource group

ScopeSelector.description: Contains information of scope to which resource filter is applied

resourceGroupFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on resource group identifiers

items.description: Filter role assignments based on resource group identifiers

roleFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on role identifiers

items.description: Filter role assignments based on role identifiers

roleReferenceFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on roles

scopeFilters.description: Filter role assignments based on scope filters

harnessManagedFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on role assignments being harness managed

disabledFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on whether they are enabled or disabled

principalTypeFilter.description: Filter role assignments based on principal type

validatePrincipal.description: Set it to true if the principal needs to be validated

validateRole.description: Set it to true if the role needs to be validated

validateResourceGroup.description: Set it to true if the resource group needs to be validated
